# Seeds for failure cases generated by proptest.
# Stored in-repo so fuzz regressions are deterministic and replayable locally.
cc 5b84fea66cf3e685c29ee0ef7a4b117773f02f09a00751ab4128a990b5632161 # shrinks to base_term = 1, initial_generation = 0, next_generation = 0, use_term = true, next_term = 2, proposer_choice = 1, leader_choice = 1, nodes_count = 1
cc 6dc04d98b0e3017c33d37cfc76ba2ff241b92fc88d8d13fbb41f4978f0bc009b # shrinks to base_term = 1, use_term = false, next_term = 0, initial_generation = 1, next_generation = 0
cc 581b3e36d7c5b16178df7d22f8e8822321dd9bfe5e7b43938bd2b2833d0c7778 # shrinks to base_term = 1, use_term = true, next_term = 0, initial_generation = 3, next_generation = 0
